description:
The sssd-ipa package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install sssd-ipa
rationale:
<tt>sssd-ipa</tt> provides the IPA back end that the SSSD can utilize to
fetch identity data from and authenticate against an IPA server.
ocil_clause: the sssd-ipa package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the sssd-ipa package is installed: 
$ rpm -q sssd-ipa
title: Install sssd-ipa Package
